title: Gabgabbes Music
description: Adds Gabgabbes Music To The Game With Music Discs
body:
## **🎵 Gabgabbes Music for Minecraft 🎵**

Bring the sound of Gabgabbe into your Minecraft world!
This mod adds a collection of Gabgabbes’ music directly into the game, letting you enjoy the tracks while you explore, build, and survive.

## **✨ Features**

Adds Gabgabbes’ music as in-game tracks

Seamlessly integrates with Minecraft’s existing music system

Perfect for relaxing builds, long mining sessions, or just vibing in your world

Lightweight and easy to install

## **📀 How It Works**

Once installed, you can get the music disc by crafting it. Then a jukebox and you can play Gabgabbes music.

## **⚠️ Notes**

This mod is purely cosmetic/audio and does not affect gameplay mechanics.

## **❤️ Credits**

### Music/Mod made by [Gabgabbe](https://modrinth.com/user/Gabgabbe)
